zh.lifeSummary: 當John Abram Brown於1576年9月6日出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍可頓時，他的父親Robert Browne27歲，母親Lydia Joann Sayers20歲。他於大約1613年與Dorothy Unknown結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1636年住在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯度波利且於1643年住在美國麻薩諸塞州布里斯托陶頓。他去世於1662年4月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年85歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Abram Brown于1576年9月6日出生在英国英格兰素福爾可霍可頓时，他的父亲Robert Browne27岁，母亲Lydia Joann Sayers20岁。他于大约1613年与Dorothy Unknown结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1636年住在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯度波利且于1643年住在美国马萨诸塞州布里斯托陶頓。他去世于1662年4月10日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托雷沃斯享年85岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德普洛維登斯普洛維登斯。

nameMeanings.name: Brown
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

variants.name: Brunson
meanings: English: usually from the Middle English personal name Brun (Old English Brūna or Old Norse Brúni) + -son ‘Brown's son’. See Brown . There may also be occasional survivals of an Old English compound personal name Brūnsunu ‘brown son’, attested in the Domesday Book, and presumably given to a child with brown hair or complexion. Whether it was also used as an adult nickname is uncertain. This form of the surname is most common in Norfolk.

variants.name: Browning
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Brouning (Old English Brūning), a derivative of the byname Brūn (see Brown ).

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. William Browning was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Browne
meanings: English: variant of   Brown  .
Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Burnett
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Tyrone and Antrim): descriptive nickname of Norman origin, from Old French burnete, a diminutive of brun ‘brown’ (see Brown ), or possibly in some instances a metonymic occupational name for a maker or seller of burnete, a high quality woolen cloth, originally dark brown in color.
Probably also an altered form of English   Barnett  .
In some cases also an altered form of French   Burnet  ; compare   Burnette  .

variants.name: Erjavec
meanings: Slovenian: nickname from an old spelling of rjavec, most commonly meaning ‘dark skinned man’ and ‘brown horse’. Compare Brown .

variants.name: Borron
meanings: Scottish: perhaps a variant of   Brown   in a Scottish pronunciation. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Broun
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Boris, Lyubov, Sergey.
Scottish: variant of   Brown  .
Jewish: variant of   Braun  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

nameMeanings.name: Abram
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, a variant of Abraham . It was probably originally a distinct name (meaning ‘high father’ in Hebrew). According to Genesis 17:5, the patriarch's name was changed by divine command from Abram to Abraham. From the Middle Ages, however, if not before, it was taken to be a contracted version.

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.
In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.
Parent History: 1643 – 1685 New Plymouth Colony, Massachusetts Colony 1685 – 1776 Bristol County, Massachusetts Colony 1776 – Today: Bristol County, Massachusetts

en.lifeSummary: When John Abram Brown was born on 6 September 1576, in Hawkedon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Browne, was 27 and his mother, Lydia Joann Sayers, was 20. He married Dorothy Unknown about 1613. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States in 1636 and Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, United States in 1643. He died on 10 April 1662, in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 85, and was buried in Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Abram Brown est né le 6 septembre 1576, à Hawkedon, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Browne, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Lydia Joann Sayers, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Dorothy Unknown environ 1613. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1636 et à Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, États-Unis en 1643. Il est décédé le 10 avril 1662, à Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Abram Brown am 6. September 1576 in Hawkedon, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Browne 27 und seine Mutter Lydia Joann Sayers 20. Er hat um 1613 Dorothy Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1636 hat er in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und 1643 in Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 10. April 1662 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United: Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America
it.lifeSummary: Quando John Abram Brown è nato il il 6 settembre 1576 nel Hawkedon, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Browne, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Lydia Joann Sayers, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Dorothy Unknown circa 1613. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1636 e nel Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1643. Morì il 10 aprile 1662, nel Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: John Abram Brownが1576年9月6日にイギリスイギリススフォルクハウケドンで生まれた時，父Robert Browneは27歳，母Lydia Joann Sayersは20歳であった。約1613年にDorothy Unknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1636年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州プリモウスダクスブリーに，1643年にはアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ブリストルタウントンに住んでいた。彼は1662年4月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルレhオボスで85歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドプロヴィデンスプロヴィデンスにて埋葬された。

ko.Rehoboth, Bristol, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스

ko.Ipswich, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 이프스위치
ko.Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스 프로비데스
ko.Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스
ko.lifeSummary: John Abram Brown(이)가 1576년 9월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 호케던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Browne(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Lydia Joann Sayers(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1613년 Dorothy Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1636년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 플림우스 드스버이에서, 1643년도에 미국 매사추세츠 주 브리스톨 타운턴에서 살았다. 그는 1662년 4월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 레홉스에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 프로비데스 프로비데스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Abram Brown nasceu em 6 de setembro de 1576, em Hawkedon, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Browne, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Lydia Joann Sayers, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothy Unknown aproximadamente 1613. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1636 e em Taunton, Bristol, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América em 1643. Ele faleceu em 10 de abril de 1662, em Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Abram Brown родился 6 сентября 1576 г. в местности ховкедон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Browne было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Lydia Joann Sayers, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothy Unknown около 1613 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности дуксбури, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1636 году и в местности таунтон, бристол, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в 1643 году. Он умер 10 апреля 1662 г. в местности рэобот, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности провиденс, провиденс, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Abram Brown nació el 6 de septiembre de 1576, en Hawkedon, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Browne, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Lydia Joann Sayers, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Dorothy Unknown aproximadamente 1613. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Duxbury, Plymouth, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1636 y en Taunton, Bristol, Masachusets, Estados Unidos en 1643. Murió el 10 de abril de 1662, en Rehoboth, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 85 años, y fue sepultado en Providence, Providence, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.
